rewritten_requirements: The system shall change mode from 'Display' to 'change hour' on a single press of the mode button.
The system shall increment the hour by one unit upon each press of the advance button while in 'change hour' mode.
The system shall change mode from 'change hour' to 'change minute' on a subsequent press of the mode button.
The system shall increment the minutes by one unit upon each press of the advance button while in 'change minute' mode.
The system shall illuminate the watch face on a press of the light button, remaining illuminated until the button is released.
The system shall enable an alarm feature upon activation of the alarm button.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The watch changes mode from 'Display' to 'change hour' when the mode button is pressed once.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When you press once on the mode button, the watch changes to “change hour”.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Pressing the advance button increments the hour by a unit each time it is pressed in 'change hour' mode.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Every time you press the advance button, the hour is incremented by a unit;

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The watch changes mode from 'change hour' to 'change minute' when the mode button is pressed again.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When you press the mode button again, the watch changes to “change minute”.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Pressing the advance button increments the minutes by a unit each time it is pressed in 'change minute' mode.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Every time you press on the advance button, the minutes are incremented by a unit.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The watch face can be lit by pressing the light button and remains lit until the button is released.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A light button; by pressing it, the watch face is lit until the button is released;

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: An alarm feature can be added to the digital watch using the alarm button.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: An alarm button, which adds a standard feature to the digital watch...
